rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes using assume/guarantee syntax
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for assignments and bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq name : type = expression; for equation declarations
Use const name : type = value; for constant declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent ports in type-level contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
